## AI playground checklist

Complete before requesting human review:

- [ ] User grounding documented (persona / pain / cohort) if this is feature work
- [ ] Ran **`/noted-review`** in Cursor/Claude Code or **`$noted-review`** in Codex — paste verdict below
- [ ] Quality gate passes: `npm run format:check && npm run test:eslint-rules && npm run lint:check && npm run type:check && npm run test`
- [ ] **`team-os/features/<slug>/ship-log.md`** updated if merging toward `main`
- [ ] **`DESIGN.md`** updated if UI, colors, typography, or spacing changed
